description_long: This is a commemorative monument featuring a bust of a man mounted atop a tall, rectangular stone pedestal. The bust is finely sculpted, depicting a male figure with short hair and a serious expression, rendered in a realistic style. The pedestal is inscribed with Cyrillic text in gold, including the name 'Костик Саша' and additional details, likely commemorating the individual. The monument stands on a multi-tiered stone base, which is set on a square platform with some grass and earth visible around the edges. The overall structure is made of stone or concrete, with the bust possibly cast in bronze or a similar metal. The monument is designed to be a static, respectful tribute, likely found in a park or memorial area.
description: A realistic bust of a man on a tall, inscribed stone pedestal, set on a multi-tiered base with gold Cyrillic lettering. The monument is somber and commemorative, likely honoring an individual.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bust, gold Cyrillic inscription, and the full face of the monument.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the plain side of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bust and pedestal, with minimal detail and some grass at the base.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the profile of the bust and the unadorned side of the pedestal.
attribute_subject_matter: realistic human bust commemorating an individual named Костик Саша
attribute_location_context: The monument is installed outdoors, likely in a park or memorial area, as indicated by the grass and earth surrounding the base.
